items.title: NVIDIA Launches Ising Open Models for Quantum Computing
items.summaryShort: NVIDIA Launches Ising Open Models for Quantum Computing. NVIDIA has announced a new family of open models called NVIDIA Ising, designed to address quantum processor calibration and quantum error correction.

items.title: NestJS v12 Roadmap: Full ESM Migration, Standard Schema Validation and Modernised Toolchain
items.summaryShort: NestJS v12 Roadmap: Full ESM Migration, Standard Schema Validation and Modernised Toolchain. NestJS has announced a draft pull request for its upcoming v12.0.0 release, scheduled for early Q3 2026.

items.title: Driving and Measuring the Impact of Platform Engineering
items.summaryShort: Driving and Measuring the Impact of Platform Engineering. Platform engineering has to be approached from a socio-technical perspective, and shaped by all stakeholders, not just developers, Sergiu Petean said in his talk Driving the Future o

items.title: Cloudflare Announces Agent Memory, a Managed Persistent Memory Service for AI Agents
items.summaryShort: Cloudflare Announces Agent Memory, a Managed Persistent Memory Service for AI Agents. Cloudflare announced Agent Memory in private beta, a managed service that extracts structured memories from AI agent conversations and retrieves them on d

items.title: Meta's Approach to Migrating their Systems to Post-Quantum Cryptography
items.summaryShort: Meta's Approach to Migrating their Systems to Post-Quantum Cryptography. Meta has already begun preparing for the threats posed by quantum computing and migrating its systems to post-quantum cryptography, a complex process that will take mu

items.title: ChatGPT Images 2.0 is a hit in India, but not a big winner elsewhere, yet
items.summaryShort: ChatGPT Images 2.0 is a hit in India, but not a big winner elsewhere, yet. Users in India are embracing ChatGPT Images 2.0 for creative, personal visuals — from avatars to cinematic portraits.

items.title: As Tim Cook steps down, Apple hit record sales — but a chip shortage looms
items.summaryShort: As Tim Cook steps down, Apple hit record sales — but a chip shortage looms. Cook warned that Apple is facing supply-chain headwinds from RAMageddon that could impact its business.

items.title: Y Combinator alum Skio sells for $105M cash, only raised $8M, founder says
items.summaryShort: Y Combinator alum Skio sells for $105M cash, only raised $8M, founder says. Subscription billing fintech Skio sold to its competitor Recharge in what was a healthy exit, according to its founder and former CEO.
